---
title: "Individual differences in face and voice matching abilities: The relationship between accuracy and consistency"
authors: "Kramer, R., Jones, A. L., & Gous, G."
year: 2021
date: 2021-01-01
pub-journal: "Applied Cognitive Psychology"
volume: "35(1)"
pages: "192–202"
doi: "10.1002/acp.3754"
pdf: "assets/papers/2021/Kramer, Jones, & Gous 2021.pdf"
categories: [face-perception]
---
